prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华东师范大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约2103名、2169名、3150名、3189名、3695名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1592名；2 025年基准位次约3695名，较2024年下降约506名，降幅明显；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为22人，2024年增至25人，2025年增至27人；2026年 计划28人，较2025年增加1人，小幅扩招约3.7%，扩招对竞争压力有一定缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设 高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第29名（Top30），近年排名稳定在28–31名区间，学校层次高、综合实力强；该校近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖 音学校热度排名第28位（总排名106所），评价为较热，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度温和偏热；未见历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A- 及以上学科共14个，包括教育学A+、统计学A+、体育学A+、心理学A、数学A、软件工程A、中国语言文学A、地理学A等，学科实力突出，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度呈分化观望状态，2024年热度指数55.84，推荐与劝退意见并存；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；天津市2026年 高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年约71938人增长约14%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；华东师范大学位于上海市（非本省），在天津市招生计划从2021年22人逐步扩至2026年28人，招生规模适中且持续扩大，对天津考生报 考意愿有正向作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（27→28人）、天津市考生总数大幅增长（约14%）、学校声誉平稳偏热、优势学科实 力突出等因素，在2025年基准位次3695名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次继续后移。预测最低位次约3827名，区间3444–4210名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（普陀校区）
- 统计学类（含统计学、数据科学）（普陀校区）
- 软件工程（普陀校区）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（普陀校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 汉语言文学（闵行校区）
- 心理学类（心理学、应用心理学）（普陀校区）
- 数学与应用数学（闵行校区）
- 微电子科学与工程（闵行校区）
- 金融学（双学位）（与统计学双学士学位培养）（普陀校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 新闻传播学类（新闻学、编辑出版学）（闵行校区）
- 政治学与行政学（闵行校区）
- 历史学（闵行校区）
- 汉语国际教育（普陀校区）
- 哲学（闵行校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3444–4210名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为保底选择。若位次优于区间下限（3444名以内），可重点冲刺一档的计算机科学 与技术、统计学类、软件工程等王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（4210名附近），建议以三档专业保底为主，争取二档专业。华东师范大学教育学A+、统计学A+等优势学科实力突 出，报考时优先考虑与优势学科关联的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for East China Normal University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 2103, 2169, 3150, 3189, and 3695, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1592 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3695, a decrease of about 506 places compared to 2024, a significant drop; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Tianjin was 22 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 25 in 2024, and to 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28 students, an increase of 1 student from 2025, a small expansion of about 3.7%, which alleviates competition pressure to some extent but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 29th (Top 30), with stable rankings in the 28–31 range in recent years, indicating a high level and strong comprehensive strength; its reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin school popularity ranking is 28th (out of 106 schools), rated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate to high application attention; no historical record of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Statistics A+, Sports Science A+, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Software Engineering A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Geography A, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors shows a polarized wait-and-see state, with a 2024 popularity index of 55.84, and mixed recommendations and dissuasion; computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from about 71,938 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai (not in this province), with enrollment plans in Tianjin gradually expanding from 22 in 2021 to 28 in 2026, with a moderate and continuously expanding scale, positively influencing Tianjin candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (27→28), the significant increase in the number of Tianjin candidates (about 14%), the stable and slightly hot reputation of the university, and the outstanding strength of advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3695, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to continue moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3827, with a range of 3444–4210.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Putuo Campus)
- Statistics (including Statistics, Data Science) (Putuo Campus)
- Software Engineering (Putuo Campus)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Putuo Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Minhang Campus)
- Psychology (Psychology, Applied Psychology) (Putuo Campus)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Minhang Campus)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Minhang Campus)
- Finance (Dual Degree) (Dual Bachelor's with Statistics) (Putuo Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Editing and Publishing) (Minhang Campus)
- Political Science and Public Administration (Minhang Campus)
- History (Minhang Campus)
- Chinese International Education (Putuo Campus)
- Philosophy (Minhang Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3444–4210, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 3444), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Statistics, and Software Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4210), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety choices while striving for Tier 2 majors. East China Normal University has outstanding advantageous disciplines such as Education A+ and Statistics A+, so when applying, prioritize majors related to these advantageous disciplines.
